allow: Bash(python -c "from core.few_shot_loader import get_few_shot_loader; loader = get_few_shot_loader\(\); examples = loader.load_examples\(\); print\(f''Total examples: {len\(examples\)}''\); investigation = [ex for ex in examples if ''repeat'' in ex.get\(''question'', ''''\).lower\(\) or ''network'' in ex.get\(''question'', ''''\).lower\(\) or ''offender'' in ex.get\(''question'', ''''\).lower\(\)]; print\(f''Investigation examples: {len\(investigation\)}''\); print\(''Sample:'', investigation[0][''question''] if investigation else ''None''\)")
